title: Cwm Crymlyn Road Section
summary: Cwm Crymlyn Road Section is an exposed area of Tremadoc rocks that is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
text: Cwm Crymlyn Road Section is an exposed area of Tremadoc rocks that is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
